verse.name: v1
verse.lines: "Worthy is the Lamb," The hosts of heaven sing, As before the throne They make His praises ring; "Worthy is the Lamb The book to open wide, Worthy is the Lamb Who once was crucified."

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, this bleeding Lamb, Oh, this bleeding Lamb, Oh, this dying Lamb, He was found worthy; Oh, this bleeding Lamb, Oh, this bleeding Lamb, Oh, this dying Lamb, He was found worthy.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Worthy is the Lamb Who shed His precious blood To restore a world To happiness and God; "When no eye could pity And no arm could save," Jesus, for our ransom, Himself freely gave.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Worthy is the Lamb, The bleeding sacrifice Who for Adam's race Paid such a fearful price; Worthy is the Lamb, The Paschal Lamb of God, For the world received "Redemption thro' His blood."

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: "Worthy is the Lamb," Let men and angels sing, "Worthy is the Lamb," Let hallelujah's ring ; And when life is past, Upon the golden shore, "Worthy is the Lamb," We'll shout forevermore.
